store.name: Bellwether Coffee
store.tagline: Single-origin coffee, slow-roasted in small batches.
store.description: Bellwether is a small-batch specialty coffee roaster sourcing single-origin beans from named farms across Ethiopia, Colombia, and Guatemala. We roast on a 5kg drum roaster three days a week and ship within 48 hours of the roast.

audience.description: Home brewers and cafes who care about traceability, freshness, and the craft of roasting more than convenience or volume.

references.notes: Editorial product cards, restrained palette, generous whitespace.
